data.title: Lambda is using Supermicro's NVIDIA Blackwell GPU servers for AI factories, improving speed and efficiency.
data.description: Supermicro has enhanced its AI infrastructure by incorporating GPU-optimized servers, resulting in quicker outcomes. Large-scale AI factories for both training and inference have been set up in remarkably fast time frames. The implementation of Supermicro's cutting-edge liquid-cooling technology has led to decreased power and cooling expenses, promoting energy efficiency and environmental sustainability. This development took place in San Jose, where the company is headquartered.

data.title: Cécred launches Protection Collection for protective styles & extensions, offering high-performance care. 52-time award-winning Foundation Collection. Los Angeles, Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Cécred has introduced its latest Protection Collection after the success of the highly acclaimed Foundation Collection, which has won 52 awards. The new line specifically caters to protective styles and extensions, a segment that has historically been neglected. The launch took place in Los Angeles on August 25, 2025. This collection offers high-performance products backed by scientific research to provide effective care.

BARCLAYS: U.S. ECONOMY STALLING, 50% RECESSION RISK IN TWO YEARS Barclays says the U.S. economy is likely in a stall, with a 50% chance of recession in the next two years. Slower growth and payroll data indicate heightened vulnerability. Key indicators suggest stall

data.title: York Space Systems delivers 21 satellites for Tranche 1 launch, final spacecraft shipped to launch site.
data.description: In Denver, York Space Systems has officially finished and sent out its last spacecraft to the launch site for the forthcoming Tranche 1 Transport Layer launch.

data.title: Monarch® launches MonarchOne™ platform for essential industries, focusing on autonomy and AI.
data.description: In Livermore, California, Monarch has unveiled the MonarchOne™ Platform, aiming to boost autonomy and AI in vital global sectors. This launch is set to significantly impact industries by enhancing technological capabilities.

data.title: Janaína Torres named Godmother of Celebrity Xcel, the world's best female chef. Aims to celebrate culture through cuisine.
data.description: Celebrity Cruises and Torres have joined forces to honor culinary expertise and cultural appreciation. In an exciting announcement on Aug. 25, 2025, in Miami, Celebrity Cruises revealed Janaína Torres as the Godmother of Celebrity Xcel. This marks a significant moment as Torres becomes the first Brazilian chef to receive this honor. This partnership signifies a dedication to celebrating diverse cuisines and experiences.

data.title: Trade your clothes at Chicago O'Hare Airport for Kings Hawaiian soft merchandise or visit KingsHawaiian.com for purchase. Limited-edition softwear line available. Los Angeles, Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Exchange the clothes you have on at Chicago O'Hare International Airport for a cozy sweatsuit and travel gear, or visit KingsHawaiian.com to buy the exclusive Softwear Line. The popular King's Hawaiian® brand is commemorating a recent event in Los Angeles on August 25, 2025.

data.title: FIRST Insurance Funding and ePayPolicy integrate to simplify premium financing access in the insurance industry.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Northbrook, Illinois, FIRST Insurance Funding revealed its partnership with ePayPolicy to streamline access to its premium financing offerings for insurance companies. This collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency of the payment process at checkout, providing added convenience.

data.title: RSM US LLP obtains CMMC Level 2 certification as ESP for government contractors in Chicago on August 25, 2025.
data.description: In Chicago on August 25, 2025, RSM US LLP, a top provider of assurance, tax, and consulting services for the middle market, has successfully reached Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level 2 as an External Service Provider (ESP). This accomplishment signifies a significant step in enhancing their cybersecurity practices in compliance with industry standards.

data.title: EVERFI chosen as financial education resource for NYC public schools, reaching largest district in US; leader in K-12 digital finance education.
data.description: EverFi, a prominent provider of digital financial education for K-12 public schools in the US and Puerto Rico, was recently chosen as one of the two approved high school financial education resources for New York City. This decision highlights the company's leading role in delivering financial literacy programs to students. The selection will impact a significant number of high school students in New York City, underlining the importance of such educational resources in empowering youth with essential financial skills.

data.title: Texas Athletics partners with Humann to improve cardiovascular health. Humann becomes official supplement with logo in Longhorn sports venues.
data.description: An Austin native who is a pioneer in the field of health has been designated as the Official Cardiovascular Supplement for Texas Athletics. The individual's company, originating from a research program at the University of Texas Health Science Center, has achieved this prestigious status. As part of the partnership, the company's logo will be prominently featured on the playing surfaces of all Longhorn sports venues. This announcement was made in Austin, Texas on August 25, 2025 through a press release.
IDF Announces They Hit Hezbollah Fighter in Southern Lebanon

data.title: Rumors of Cristiano Ronaldo meme coin fuel $143M 'rug pull', possibly orchestrated by influencers: analysis firm.
data.description: According to Bubblemaps, a firm specializing in on-chain analysis, it is believed that a coordinated effort involving a group of influencers may be behind the incident.

data.title: Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ: BSVN) renews stock repurchase plan for two years; board of directors authorizes.
data.description: Bank7 Corp., the parent company of Bank7 located in Oklahoma City, has declared the extension of its current stock repurchase program by its board of directors. The renewed program will span two years. The Company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol BSVN. The announcement was made on August 25, 2025.

data.title: Going introduces 2025 Flight Deal Awards, ranking U.S. airports and airlines for airfare value. NEW YORK, Aug. 25, 2025 /PRNewswire.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on August 25, 2025, Going introduced the 2025 Flight Deal Awards to honor the most and least favorable airports and airlines for securing cost-effective flight options. This annual ranking aims to spotlight the top-performing U.S. airports and airlines offering exceptional value for airfares, providing useful insights for travelers seeking economical flight deals.

data.title: Organ donor Claire Rossi's family met the man whose life she saved at 70. Powerful connection underlines organ donation impact.
data.description: In a heartwarming event, LiveOnNY facilitated the emotional meeting between the family of 70-year-old organ donor Claire Rossi and the recipient whose life she saved. This powerful demonstration of the impact of organ donation took place on Aug. 25, 2025, in New York. The touching reunion highlighted the significance of organ donation, with the recipient expressing gratitude for the life-changing gift. The story showcases the incredible bond forged through donation, emphasizing the profound difference it makes in people's lives.

data.title: St. John's University implements Ellucian Student platform for better campus operations.
data.description: Ellucian, a top provider of higher education technology solutions, has launched a new platform aimed at improving the student experience and optimizing campus operations. The announcement was made on August 25, 2025, in Queens, N.Y. and Reston, Va. Specifically, St. John's University, a prominent Catholic institution, is set to benefit from this initiative. Ellucian's platform is designed to enhance efficiency and effectiveness in various campus processes, catering to the needs of students and staff. This development showcases the company's commitment to driving innovation in the education sector.

data.title: Disney celebrates World Princess Week with new content, music from Jacob Collier, featuring Jodi Benson, Auli'i Cravalho, Paige O'Hara, and Anika Noni Rose.
data.description: Recently, a brand new commercial was released featuring music by seven-time Grammy® Award winner Jacob Collier, highlighting the boundless creativity drawn from Disney princesses. The spot unites iconic voices like Jodi Benson, Auli'i Cravalho, Paige O'Hara, and Anika Noni Rose. This collaboration aimed to showcase the enchanting world of Disney with a fusion of talent and imagination. The ad is set to captivate audiences with its magical essence and is expected to gain significant traction given the renowned artists involved.

data.title: Alloy wins Datos Insights 2025 Fraud & AML Impact Award for Best KYC/KYB Innovation. Alloy for Embedded Finance recognized.
data.description: In New York on August 25, 2025, Alloy, a prominent provider of identity verification and fraud prevention services, received recognition for its groundbreaking innovation in Know Your Customer/Business (KYC/KYB). The company's Sponsor Banks solution, Alloy for Embedded Finance, was awarded the title of Best in KYC/KYB Innovation. This acknowledgment highlights Alloy's commitment to delivering cutting-edge technology in the finance industry.

data.title: Galderma releases Cetaphil Nourishing Oil to Foam Cleanser: combines hydration and cleansing, 24-hour moisture, backed by dermatologists.
data.description: A new dual-phase skincare innovation has been introduced that effectively removes makeup, excess oil, and dirt, providing 24 hours of hydration without drying out the skin. The formula has been endorsed by Board-certified dermatologist Dr. Angelo Landriscina, highlighting its science-backed approach and the presence of dermatologist-trusted ingredients. This product has gained popularity among Gen Z individuals, with impressive numbers of positive feedback and support.
